calendar.matters:
Petition For Order Determining Title To Real Property
Off Calendar Apr-13-2021 Denied
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: William Adams appeared by zoom for Jennifer Herrera.

The Court stated that a trust cannot be a trustee of a trust, that it has seen the supplemental pleading and that based on the pleadings it intends to deny the petition. Mr. Adams argued that it is clear that the Grandfather intended that the property go to his Daughter Ms. Grant, that Ms. Grant intended that the property go to her Daughter Ms. Herrera, that Ms. Herrera has a trust and that what the Court should be seeing is the intent of the trustors. Mr. Adams also stated that there are no other beneficiaries, that there is the issue of the real property, that the issue is where the trustors intended for the property to end up and that they are asking for the Courts assistance to execute and reach the result of where the Grandfather wanted the property to go. The Petition for Order Determining Title to Real Property is under submission.

Judge: Vedica Puri. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Examiner: Sandy Hilton. Deputy: K. Kabasares. Not reported.
